items.title: Both Triggers Hit: 7,504 Broke, Oil Says Not So Fast
items.reviewedBy: machine: cut_derivatives downstream of operator-approved long-form https://youtu.be/e_zxBsWFnQc
items.copy:
The S&P closed back above 7,504 on a memory-chip rally — Micron up twelve percent. Brent closed above 91.42 the same day. Stocks and oil are telling two different war stories. Full breakdown on the channel. #stockmarket #sp500 #oil #micron #FinTok

items.title: Micron Gapped 7% and Never Looked Back
items.reviewedBy: machine: cut_derivatives downstream of operator-approved long-form https://youtu.be/e_zxBsWFnQc
items.copy:
Micron opened seven percent above Monday's close and settled up twelve. The gap cleared Monday's high at 901 — that is the floor that matters now, with 982 the ceiling. Levels read off the settled bars. #micron #semiconductors #stockmarket #trading #FinTok
